task_completion.description: Verify that the agent successfully logged into the OpenMRS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating the agent has logged in.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to the Location Management section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list of locations or a location administration page is visible in the OpenMRS interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent located and selected the target location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The location 'Temporary Fever Clinic' is visible and selected, or its specific edit/retire dialog is open.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent entered the correct retire reason.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text field for 'Retire Reason' (or similar) contains the text 'End of season'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the location retirement was successfully confirmed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification indicating the location was retired/saved, or the location 'Temporary Fever Clinic' is shown with a 'Retired' status or removed from the active locations list.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the web browser to interact with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions are performed within a web browser showing the OpenMRS application, not via terminal commands (like curl) or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual application UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show actual interaction with the OpenMRS UI elements (clicking buttons, typing in fields) rather than a text editor or mock page.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake success.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) being open and used to artificially alter the page content to simulate success.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target location to be retired is 'Temporary Fever Clinic'. The required retire reason is 'End of season' (case-insensitive). Verify that this exact location is targeted and this exact reason is entered in the UI.
